sourceTitle: AI and Generative Technology Use at CUIMC
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Sensitive Data: Permitted only on the ChatGPT Education, approved Microsoft CoPilot platforms, and CU CHAT when used with compliant models. Research protocol use requires IRB, and TRAC/ACORD approval.
